files.notes: This file contains three distinct lesson sections: Lesson III covering Genealogy (tribal surnames) and Art (October days), followed by an Art section with detailed questions about October foliage and architecture, and the beginning of Lesson IV on Home Economics. The file appears to cut off at the start of Lesson IV, suggesting it may be incomplete.
